id.description: A unique identifier for the opportunity.

title.description: The title or name of the opportunity.

primary_contact_id.description: The unique identifier of the primary contact associated with the opportunity.

description.example: Opportunities are created for People and Companies that are interested in buying your products or services. Create Opportunities for People and Companies to move them through one of your Pipelines.

monetary_amount.description: The monetary value associated with the opportunity

win_probability.description: The probability of winning the opportunity, expressed as a percentage.

expected_revenue.description: The expected revenue from the opportunity

close_date.description: The actual closing date for the opportunity. If close_date is null, the opportunity is not closed yet.

loss_reason_id.description: The unique identifier of the reason why the opportunity was lost.

loss_reason.description: The reason why the opportunity was lost.

won_reason_id.description: The unique identifier of the reason why the opportunity was won.

won_reason.description: The reason why the opportunity was won.

pipeline_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline associated with the opportunity

pipeline_stage_id.description: The unique identifier of the stage in the pipeline associated with the opportunity.

source_id.description: The unique identifier of the source of the opportunity.

lead_id.description: The unique identifier of the lead associated with the opportunity.

lead_source.description: The source of the lead associated with the opportunity.

contact_id.description: The unique identifier of the contact associated with the opportunity.

contact_ids.description: An array of unique identifiers of all contacts associated with the opportunity.

company_id.description: The unique identifier of the company associated with the opportunity.

company_name.description: The name of the company associated with the opportunity.

owner_id.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the opportunity.

priority.description: The priority level of the opportunity.

status.description: The current status of the opportunity.

status_id.description: The unique identifier of the current status of the opportunity.

interaction_count.description: The number of interactions with the opportunity.

stage_last_changed_at.description: The date and time when the stage of the opportunity was last changed.

last_activity_at.description: The date and time of the last activity associated with the opportunity.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the opportunity has been deleted.

date_stage_changed.description: The date and time when the stage of the opportunity was last changed.

date_last_contacted.description: The date and time when the opportunity was last contacted.

date_lead_created.description: The date and time when the lead associated with the opportunity was created.

updated_by.description: The unique identifier of the user who last updated the opportunity.

created_by.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the opportunity.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the opportunity was last updated.

created_at.description: The date and time when the opportunity was created.
